title: Example Book of Tales Collection
author: Rob McArthur
description: AI-generated Books of Tales for the board game Tales of the Arthurian Knights, spanning the full sweep of the Arthurian legend from Camelot's founding to the ruin of the Round Table.

books.title: La Morte d'Arthur
books.description: The story of King Arthur and his knights of the round table, inspired by the book *La Morte d'Arthur* by Sir Thomas Malory.
